entities.name: COOL SEASON FOOD LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes grown during the cool season, including chickpea, lentil, khesari, faba bean, and pea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A cool season food legume important for the diet in the Indo-Gangetic Plain

entities.name: LENTIL
entities.description: A cool season food legume important for the diet in the Indo-Gangetic Plain

entities.name: KHESARI
entities.description: A cool season food legume (Lathyrus) important for the diet in the Indo-Gangetic Plain

entities.name: FABA BEAN
entities.description: A cool season food legume important for the diet in the Indo-Gangetic Plain

entities.name: PEA
entities.description: A cool season food legume important for the diet in the Indo-Gangetic Plain

entities.name: INDO-GANGETIC PLAIN
entities.description: An ecoregion where cool season food legumes are traditionally grown

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: An input-responsive and profitable crop preferred by farmers over cool season food legumes

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: An input-responsive and profitable crop preferred by farmers over cool season food legumes

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop harvested, which is currently uncertain for cool season food legumes

entities.name: ABERRANT CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Unpredictable weather patterns that contribute to yield uncertainty

entities.name: PEST
entities.description: Biotic constraints that affect the production and yield of cool season food legumes

entities.name: DISEASE
entities.description: Biotic constraints that affect the production and yield of cool season food legumes

entities.name: IMPROVED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technical components effective in alleviating abiotic and biotic constraints to cool season food legume production

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of production systems to maintain productivity over time

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of growing a variety of crops to enhance food production and sustainability

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL SUPPORT
entities.description: Incentives and farmer-friendly policies to ensure dependable income and technology adoption
